nasb.text: Now there was a man of Benjamin whose name was Kish the son of Abiel, the son of Zeror, the son of Becorath, the son of Aphiah, the son of a Benjamite, a mighty man of valor.

esv.text: There was a man of Benjamin whose name was Kish, the son of Abiel, son of Zeror, son of Becorath, son of Aphiah, a Benjaminite, a man of wealth.

cnv.text: 有一個便雅憫人，名叫基士，是亞別的兒子。亞別是洗羅的兒子，洗羅是比歌拉的兒子，比歌拉是亞斐亞的兒子。

ccb.text: 有一个便雅悯人名叫基士，很有威望，是亚斐亚的玄孙、比歌拉的曾孙、洗罗的孙子、亚别的儿子。
